policy_design_reasoning.single_room_anchor_rule: Use provider-day modal room as anchor for deterministic and reproducible single-room behavior while preserving original appointment timing.
policy_design_reasoning.cluster_threshold_choice: Threshold 2.0 balances strict locality (<=1.0 can over-constrain) and overly loose movement (<=3.0 often behaves close to unconstrained).
policy_design_reasoning.blocked_days_auto_strong: Round-robin weekday blocking is a stress-test policy that intentionally creates broad availability pressure instead of reflecting baseline operations.
policy_design_reasoning.comparison_fairness: All policies are evaluated as post-processing transforms on the same baseline schedule to isolate policy effects without rerunning optimization.
